## Compliance Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed (no `.env`, service account JSON, API keys)
- [ ] Firebase rules reviewed (`firestore.rules`, `storage.rules`)
- [ ] Data minimization: only store what is needed
- [ ] User data access restricted to the authenticated user
- [ ] Admin-only paths restricted to `idin@agape.nyc` / `agape@sovereign.nyc`
